reviews.review_title: I don't like the FPS aspect
reviews.review_description: I enjoy games with exploration and puzzles. Unfortunately, once I started having to shoot at creatures and having to restart the level if I didn't manage to kill them, I quickly lost interest.

Update :This time it downloaded perfectly without a play protect warning. I still don't understand how I got that, but now it's fine. Haven't had time to really get into it yet, but so far so good. 👍👍 Thanks again for the fast support!

developer_response.body: thank you very much, if it happens again a screenshot will be very helpfull to send to Oculus support. Anyway i hope you can play the game, and i can guarantee (under my responsability) that the app is safe.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games for the Go
reviews.review_description: The ambiance gives memorable experiences. It's a mix of terror and puzzle adventure. A piece of art.
Brought full game great game everything about this game spot on can be a bit scary but in a good way recommend full game
I really wanted to like it, but somehow the combination of platform hopping, retro graphics, difficult aiming and unpleasant controls didn't work for me.

I played this on the Oculus GO. I have almost downloaded this demo several times but was put off by the screenshots that emphasize the FPS aspect (and the badly chosen enemy graphics) and don't give any impression of the exploration and semi-puzzling (shooting switches) aspect. I actually really enjoyed it although did prefer the exploration part to the FPS part, and the choice of enemies seemed a bit random.

If this wasn't a free demo I would never have tried it based on the screenshots, but now I have tried it I look forward to the finished product.
